zh.lifeSummary: 當Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine於大約1224年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾時，他的父親Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologos36歲，母親Theodora Palaiologina36歲。他於大約1248年與Philanthropene在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他去世於1282年12月11日在土耳其易斯坦波爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine于大约1224年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾时，他的父亲Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologos36岁，母亲Theodora Palaiologina36岁。他于大约1248年与Philanthropene在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他去世于1282年12月11日在土耳其易斯坦波爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mihalis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Croatian (Mihalić); Slovenian and Rusyn (from Slovakia) (Mihalič): patronymic from the personal name Mihal, an equivalent of Michael (as a dialect variant of Croatian and Slovenian Mihael, and as a regional variant of Rusyn Mykhal). Compare Mihalich , Mihalick , and Mehalic .

variants.name: Mehalic
meanings: Apparently an altered form of   Mahalia .

variants.name: Michael
meanings: form of a common biblical name (meaning ‘who is like God?’ in Hebrew) borne by one of the archangels, the protector of the ancient Hebrews, who is also regarded as a saint of the Catholic Church. In the Middle Ages, Michael was regarded as captain of the heavenly host (see Revelation 12:7–9), symbol of the Church Militant, and patron of soldiers. He was often depicted bearing a flaming sword. The name is also borne by a Persian prince and ally of Belshazzar mentioned in the Book of Daniel. Since the early 1900s it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names in the English-speaking world.  See also  Michal .

variants.name: Mihalich
meanings: Americanized form of Croatian Mihalić, Slovenian and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Mihalič (see Mihalic ).

en.lifeSummary: When Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine was born about 1224, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, his father, Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologos, was 36 and his mother, Theodora Palaiologina, was 36. He married Philanthropene about 1248, in İstanbul, Türkiye. He died on 11 December 1282, in İstanbul, Türkiye, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine est né environ 1224, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, son père, Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologos, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Theodora Palaiologina, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Philanthropene environ 1248, à İstanbul, Turquie. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1282, à İstanbul, Turquie, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine um 1224 in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologos 36 und seine Mutter Theodora Palaiologina 36. Er hat um 1248 in İstanbul, Türkei Philanthropene geheiratet. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1282 im Alter von 59 Jahren in İstanbul, Türkei.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine è nato il circa 1224 nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, il suo padre, Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologos, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Theodora Palaiologina, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Philanthropene circa 1248, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Morì il 11 dicembre 1282, nel İstanbul, Turchia, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantineが約1224年にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで生まれた時，父Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologosは36歳，母Theodora Palaiologinaは36歳であった。約1248年にトルコイスタンブルでPhilanthropeneと結婚した。彼は1282年12月11日にトルコイスタンブルで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine(이)가 대략 1224년 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologos(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Theodora Palaiologina(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1248년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Philanthropene(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1282년 12월 11일 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine nasceu aproximadamente 1224, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologos, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Theodora Palaiologina, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Philanthropene aproximadamente 1248, em İstanbul, Turquia. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1282, em İstanbul, Turquia, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine родился около 1224 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция, его отцу по имени Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologos было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Theodora Palaiologina, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Philanthropene около 1248 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. Он умер 11 декабря 1282 г. в местности истанбул, Турция в возрасте 59 лет.

sm.du 1248 au 1252: mai le 1248 e o'o I le 1252

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emperor Mihalis Palaiologos VIII  of Byzantine nació aproximadamente 1224, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, Andronikos Komnenos Palaiologos, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Theodora Palaiologina, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Philanthropene aproximadamente 1248, en İstanbul, Turquía. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1282, en İstanbul, Turquía, a la edad de 59 años.
